title: Frequently Asked Questions
description: Find answers to the most common questions about ZXPong, including game modes, World PVP, BarkinMad Coins, achievements, and leaderboards.
summary: Quick answers to the questions players ask most often about ZXPong.

sections.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
paragraphs: Looking for a quick answer? This page covers some of the most common questions about ZXPong.
If you can't find what you're looking for here, explore the guides for more detailed information about gameplay, progression, and multiplayer.

faq.question: Is ZXPong available on the App Store?
faq.answer: Yes. ZXPong is available to download from the App Store using the link on this website.

faq.question: Which game modes are available?
faq.answer: ZXPong includes Solo play and World PVP. Each mode offers its own challenge while sharing the same fast-paced arcade gameplay.

faq.question: Does ZXPong use BarkinMad Coins?
faq.answer: Yes. You can earn BarkinMad Coins through gameplay and use them to unlock cosmetic paddle skins across supported ZX Series games.

faq.question: Which leaderboard should I focus on?
faq.answer: The main ZXPong leaderboard tracks your Longest Rally, allowing you to compare your best performances with players around the world.

images.caption: Quick answers to help you get the most from ZXPong.

featureShowcases.heading: Quick Answers When You Need Them
featureShowcases.summary: Find answers to common ZXPong questions without searching through every guide.
body: Whether you're learning the basics, exploring multiplayer, or checking how BarkinMad Coins and leaderboards work, this page provides quick answers to the questions players ask most often.
For more detailed information, each answer links to the relevant guide so you can continue exploring the game.
bullets: Easy links to more detailed guides.
Helpful for both new and returning players.

image.caption: Quick answers to help you enjoy every match.
